info.title: CleanAll
info.description: A package that removes all bin and obj files that sometimes a 3rd party tool leaves behind after a dotnet clean is ran.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Delete all of the bin and obj directories and their contents in a solution or project folder.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Run the command without removing anything so you can see what will be deleted. [default: False]

arguments.name: Path
arguments.description: Path to the solution file, project file or directory to clean.
